Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rose Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Rose asked for mercy when Alin killed Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Rose Light provides empathy and warmth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Rose Light is a type of light Alin can use for healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Rose Light sympathizes with physical pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Rose Light is a power of Elysia that Alin possesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Rose Light is a voice that whispers questions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Rose Light repairs wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Rose Light can repair eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Rose Light whispered about Simon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
